issues.description: SearchDeck filter is incomplete: missing type filter for {Scientist} and exclusion of [Vegapunk]. The filter only checks cost ≤5 but should also require type=Scientist and name≠Vegapunk.
SearchDeck is missing the look at 5 cards mechanic and placing rest at bottom of deck in any order. Current action implies searching entire deck.
TrashFromHand action is missing the conditional requirement 'if your opponent has 2 or less Characters'. This should be wrapped in a condition or part of a conditional action.
Spurious effect with trigger 'Trigger' that draws 1 card. The official text mentions [Blocker] keyword but no trigger effect that draws cards. This entire effect should not exist.
Missing [Blocker] keyword encoding. While this is typically a card attribute rather than an effect, it should be represented if the DSL schema supports it.
